description_long: This is a rectangular swimming pool with a light beige deck surrounding a clear blue body of water. The pool features a semi-circular extension at one end, adding architectural interest and providing a shallow entry area. Metal ladders are installed at both the rectangular and rounded ends, allowing easy access in and out of the water. The pool's water appears clean and still, with a smooth reflective surface. The structure is elevated above a black and gray base, suggesting it is a standalone installation rather than in-ground. The overall design is modern and suitable for urban recreational spaces such as parks, community centers, or residential complexes.
description: A rectangular swimming pool with a beige deck, clear blue water, and metal ladders at both ends, featuring a semi-circular shallow entry.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full rectangular length, beige deck, and both metal ladders.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the semi-circular extension and two ladders on the rounded side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the semi-circular end visible on the left.
description_view_3: View from the semi-circular end, showing the rounded entry and both ladders on this side.
